creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> sean, are you going to handle this PR?  I forgot all about it.
> 
> If you don't intend to, tell me and I'll move it patch-ready unevaluated.

Please let Jonathan have this port and commit what he needs done.  I can be a backup if needbe.
